__inputs.name: DS_PROMETHEUS
__inputs.label: Prometheus
__inputs.description: Grafana Cloud Prometheus/Mimir data source that Alloy remote-writes to

title: Zdravy projekt - Backend Overview
description: Django/Celery backend golden signals, latency percentiles, slowest endpoints, login stats, DB/cache health. Fed by Grafana Alloy scraping /metrics/ and remote-writing to Grafana Cloud.

panels.title: Login attempts over time (peak login times)
Overall traffic over time (peak usage times)
CPU usage (%)
panels.description: Rate of CPU time consumed by the Django process. Sustained high values indicate a CPU-bound workload.

panels.title: Process memory
panels.description: RSS = actual physical RAM used. Virtual includes shared libs. High RSS growth over time may indicate a memory leak.

panels.title: File descriptor utilization
panels.description: Open FDs as % of the process limit. Above 80% risks EMFILE errors.

panels.title: HTTP vs HTTPS traffic
panels.description: Request rate split by transport. Unexpected HTTP traffic in production may indicate a misconfigured proxy.

panels.title: Latency: view vs full middleware stack (p95)
panels.description: Gap between lines = middleware overhead per request. Large gap points to slow middleware (auth, sessions, CORS, etc.).
